name: Corn Flake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Janet Sarasota
In a large heavy saucepan over low heat, combine the sugar, peanut butter, and corn syrup. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly until the sugar dissolves. Add the cornflakes and coconut. Turn off the heat. Drop tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper and let cool. Makes about 40.
